CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $739.10 FILED BY K & G TRANSPORTATION INC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DESIGNER CO-OP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESIGNER CO-OP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT K & G TRANSPORTATION INC $2,512.00 PRINCIPAL, $146.51 INTEREST, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,673.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESIGNER CO-OP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT K & G TRANSPORTATION INC $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, REMANDED FROM SUP. CT. SCA-22638 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
